description.example: Sent to new customers on account creation

channel.description:
Communication channel:
- `email` — Transactional/marketing email
- `sms` — SMS to mobile
- `push` — Mobile push notification
- `document_digital` — PDF via secure online portal
- `document_postal` — Physical postal mail
- `auto` — Smart routing (platform selects optimal channel)
channel.title: Channel

content.description: Template content definition. Supports Handlebars syntax (`{{variableName}}`).

subject.description: Email subject line (email channel only). Supports variable substitution.

body.example: Dear {{firstName}}, your account {{accountNumber}} is now active.

htmlBody.description: HTML email body (email channel only). Takes precedence over `body` for HTML-capable clients.

content.title: TemplateContent

required.description: If true, message send will fail if this variable is not provided

variables.description: Declared template variables. Used for validation and documentation.

message.example: Must be one of: email, sms, push, document_digital, document_postal, auto
Must be one of: email, sms, push, document_digital, document_postal, auto

example.message: The requested resource was not found
